##你知唔知可以用markdown?
**粗體係兩粒星**
###唔同level既標題都得
_斜題係underscore_
###program都可以打
`import police_brutality`
###仲可以用checklist
- 1st item
-[ ] unchecked 2nd item
-[x] checked 3rd item
###同埋table
| Tables   |      Are      |  Cool |
|----------|:-------------:|------:|
| col 1 is |  left-aligned | $1600 |
| col 2 is |    centered   |   $12 |
| col 3 is | right-aligned |    $1 |
###又可以quote link
[I'm an inline-style link](https://www.google.com)
